steps.title: Define the quantities
steps.content: Let $a$ be the number of people who voted against the proposal, and let $f$ be the number who voted in favor.

steps.title: Write the two equations
steps.content:
Four times as many people voted in favor as against, and there were $24{,}000$ more votes in favor.
$$f=4a$$
$$f=a+24{,}000$$

steps.title: Solve for against votes
steps.content:
Set the two expressions for $f$ equal.
$$4a=a+24{,}000$$
$$3a=24{,}000$$
$$a=8{,}000$$
The answer is A.
